pests.name: brown planthopper
pests.symptoms: drying of leaves, hopper burn in patches, honey dew secretion
pests.treatment: Spray Dinotefuran 20% SG @ 200g/ha or Pymetrozine 50% WG @ 300g/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Drain the field completely for 3-4 days to check pest multiplication

pests.name: stem borer
pests.symptoms: dead hearts in vegetative stage, white heads in reproductive stage
pests.treatment: Apply Cartap Hydrochloride 4G @ 25 kg/ha or Chlorantraniliprole 18.5 SC @ 150 ml/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Maintain 2-3 cm standing water, do not dry completely

advisories.irrigation: Alternate Wetting and Drying (AWD)

pests.name: yellow rust
pests.symptoms: yellow stripes of pustules on leaves, powdery yellow dust
pests.treatment: Spray Propiconazole 25% EC @ 500 ml in 500 liters of water per hectare
pests.irrigation_impact: Avoid excessive irrigation during cloudy weather

pests.name: aphids
pests.symptoms: sucking cell sap from leaves and earheads, sticky honey dew
pests.treatment: Spray Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 100 ml/ha or Thiamethoxam 25 WG @ 100g/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Ensure proper irrigation, water-stressed crops are more susceptible

advisories.irrigation: 4-5 critical irrigations (CRI, Jointing, Flowering, Milk stage)

pests.name: fall armyworm
pests.symptoms: papery windowpane feeding marks, large ragged holes, frass in whorls
pests.treatment: Spray Emamectin Benzoate 5% SG @ 0.4g/L or Spinetoram 11.7 SC @ 0.5ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Provide light irrigation to keep plants vigorous

advisories.irrigation: Irrigate at critical stages: tasseling, silking, grain filling

pests.name: pink bollworm
pests.symptoms: rosette flowers, hollowed-out seeds, stained lint, holes in green bolls
pests.treatment: Spray Profenophos 50 EC @ 2ml/L or Lambdacyhalothrin 5 EC @ 1ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Avoid late-season irrigation which extends vegetative growth

advisories.irrigation: 4-5 irrigations; sensitive to waterlogging, ensure drainage

pests.name: early shoot borer
pests.symptoms: dead hearts in young shoots, easily pulled out, emits offensive smell
pests.treatment: Apply Chlorantraniliprole 0.4% G @ 18.75 kg/ha or soil drenching with Chlorantraniliprole 18.5 SC @ 375 ml/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Frequent light irrigations during hot weather reduce pest incidence

advisories.irrigation: 10-12 irrigations, drip system highly recommended

pests.name: whitefly
pests.symptoms: yellow leaves, sticky honey dew, soot like growth, leaf curling
pests.treatment: Spray Neem oil 5% or Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.3 ml/L of water
pests.irrigation_impact: Reduce water for 2 days, let soil dry out slightly

pests.name: early blight
pests.symptoms: concentric target-board rings on older leaves, yellow halo
pests.treatment: Spray Mancozeb 75% WP @ 2g/L or Tebuconazole @ 1ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Avoid overhead sprinkler irrigation; keep foliage dry

advisories.irrigation: Drip irrigation, 5-7 days interval

pests.name: late blight
pests.symptoms: water-soaked spots on leaves, white cottony growth on underside, rapid browning
pests.treatment: Spray Metalaxyl + Mancozeb @ 2.5 g/L or Cymoxanil + Mancozeb @ 2 g/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Suspend irrigation immediately if relative humidity exceeds 90%

advisories.irrigation: Light furrow irrigations, maintain 60-70% soil moisture

pests.name: thrips
pests.symptoms: silvery patches on leaves, leaf curling and drying from tips
pests.treatment: Spray Fipronil 5 SC @ 1.5 ml/L or Deltamethrin @ 1 ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Sprinkler irrigation helps in washing away thrips populations

advisories.irrigation: 10-12 day interval; stop irrigation 15 days before harvest

pests.name: girdle beetle
pests.symptoms: two parallel rings girdled on stems, drying of leaves and branches
pests.treatment: Spray Chlorantraniliprole 18.5 SC @ 150 ml/ha or Thiacloprid 21.7 SC @ 650 ml/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Maintain soil moisture but avoid waterlogging

advisories.irrigation: Mostly rainfed, needs protective irrigation at flowering/pod-filling if dry

pests.name: leaf root grub
pests.symptoms: wilting and drying of plants in patches, roots eaten up
pests.treatment: Soil application of Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 300 ml/ha or Carbofuran 3G @ 30 kg/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Apply light irrigation after treatment to wash chemical into soil

advisories.fertilizer: 20:40:50 NPK kg/ha + Gypsum 500 kg/ha at pegging
advisories.irrigation: 4-5 critical irrigations (Flowering, Pegging, Pod formation)

pests.name: pseudostem weevil
pests.symptoms: jelly-like exudation on pseudostem, pinholes on stem, breaking of leaf petiole
pests.treatment: Stem injection of Monocrotophos @ 4 ml per plant or drenching with Chlorpyriphos @ 2.5 ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Maintain optimum soil moisture, avoid dry cracks in soil

advisories.irrigation: Drip irrigation daily (15-20 liters/plant/day)

pests.name: mango hopper
pests.symptoms: infest inflorescence and leaves, honey dew secretion, development of sooty mold
pests.treatment: Spray Thiamethoxam 25 WG @ 0.2g/L or Imidacloprid 17.8 SL @ 0.3ml/L during flowering
pests.irrigation_impact: Stop irrigation during flowering to encourage fruit set

advisories.irrigation: Irrigate at 10-15 day intervals during fruit growth stage

pests.name: thrips
pests.symptoms: upward curling of leaf margins, elongation of leaves, crinkling
pests.treatment: Spray Spinosad 45 SC @ 0.3ml/L or Acetamiprid 20 SP @ 0.2g/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Avoid severe water stress; irrigate uniformly

advisories.irrigation: Regular drip or furrow irrigation; do not let dry out completely

pests.name: rhizome rot
pests.symptoms: yellowing of leaves from margins, pseudostem becomes loose, rotting rhizomes
pests.treatment: Drench soil with Metalaxyl-Mancozeb @ 2.5g/L or Trichoderma viride bioagent @ 10g/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Ensure excellent drainage, avoid water stagnancy

advisories.soil_type: Clayey loam / alluvial soil with organic matter
advisories.irrigation: 15-20 irrigations in medium-heavy soils; critical at rhizome development

pests.name: mustard aphid
pests.symptoms: infest growing points, green pods cover with aphids, leaf curling, weak plants
pests.treatment: Spray Thiamethoxam 25 WG @ 100g/ha or Dimethoate 30 EC @ 1L/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Apply irrigation at flowering to help plants resist aphid attack

advisories.irrigation: 2 irrigations critical (pre-flowering and pod-fill stage)

pests.name: wilt
pests.symptoms: sudden drooping of leaves, drying up of root system, blackening of roots
pests.treatment: Seed treatment with Carbendazim + Mancozeb @ 2.5g/kg seed; soil application of Trichoderma viride
pests.irrigation_impact: Do not flood irrigate; maintain moderate moisture

advisories.irrigation: 1-2 light irrigations, first at 35-40 days after sowing

pests.name: pod borer
pests.symptoms: defoliation in early stage, circular holes on pods, caterpillar feeding on seeds inside
pests.treatment: Spray Chlorantraniliprole 18.5 SC @ 150 ml/ha or Indoxacarb 14.5 SC @ 350 ml/ha
pests.irrigation_impact: Avoid over-irrigation; excessive moisture increases vegetative growth and pest susceptibility

advisories.irrigation: 2 protective irrigations: pre-flowering and pod development

pests.name: head rot
pests.symptoms: brownish water-soaked lesions on back of heads, rotting and shredding of heads
pests.treatment: Spray Carbendazim @ 1g/L or Mancozeb @ 2g/L on the flower head
pests.irrigation_impact: Avoid excessive irrigation at maturity stage, avoid lodging

advisories.irrigation: 4-5 irrigations; critical at bud-initiation, flowering, and seed filling

pests.name: jute semilooper
pests.symptoms: caterpillars feed on apical leaves, damaged crown, branching of stems
pests.treatment: Spray Profenophos 50 EC @ 2ml/L or Lambdacyhalothrin @ 1ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Ensure optimal irrigation; high humidity triggers infestation

advisories.irrigation: 4-5 irrigations; waterlogging must be avoided in early stages

pests.name: red spider mite
pests.symptoms: reddish-brown spots on upper surface of leaves, dusty appearance
pests.treatment: Spray Fenpyroximate 5 EC @ 1ml/L or Spiromesifen 22.9 SC @ 0.8ml/L
pests.irrigation_impact: Maintain high humidity by overhead sprinkler/mist system to check mites

advisories.soil_type: Acidic soil, rich in humus, well-drained
advisories.irrigation: Mist/sprinkler irrigation regularly to maintain microclimate
